# Muhammad Qasim — Agentic AI Engineer

Karachi, Pakistan. I build autonomous AI systems that run 24/7 — MCP servers, multi-agent orchestration, and production-grade agent workflows.

## About

Software developer based in Karachi, Pakistan. Working professional by day, agentic AI systems builder around the clock. Currently enrolled in GIAIC, where I've shipped 5 production-grade AI systems through their hackathon program — from autonomous agents to MCP servers to cloud-native orchestration. I don't explore technologies. I ship them.

## Shipped systems

- CRM Digital FTE — Autonomous customer-support agent handling WhatsApp tickets end-to-end, 24/7.
  https://github.com/Psqasim/crm-digital-fte
- Personal AI Employee — Private multi-skill agent that triages email, runs research, and drafts replies.
  https://github.com/Psqasim/personal-ai-employee
- TaskFlow — Agent-orchestrated task pipeline — ingest, plan, execute, report.
  https://github.com/Psqasim/taskflow
- Factory-de-Odoo (Architecture Advisor) — Multi-agent Odoo automation for manufacturing — inventory, orders, QA.
  https://github.com/Psqasim/factory-de-odoo
- MCP-Native Developer Tool — Dev-loop accelerator built as first-class MCP server — Cerebral Valley entry.
  https://github.com/Psqasim/mcp-native-developer-tool
